trend.name: Indonesia Digital Economy Summit 2026
trend.description: Indonesia hosts its largest digital economy summit in Jakarta, bringing together Southeast Asian tech leaders to discuss AI regulation, digital banking expansion, and cross-border e-commerce growth. The event marks a significant milestone in Indonesia's push to become a regional tech hub.

trend.name: Global AI Safety Framework Announced by United Nations
trend.description: The United Nations releases a comprehensive AI safety framework establishing international guidelines for AI development, deployment, and governance. The framework includes mandatory risk assessments for frontier AI models and new transparency requirements for AI companies.
